site.name: Kashmir Cultural Trust
site.tagline: Preserving Kashmir's Heritage, Enriching Future Generations
site.description: Dedicated to preserving, promoting, and disseminating the rich cultural heritage of Kashmir

hero.title: Preserving the Living Heritage of Kashmir
hero.subtitle: For over two decades, Kashmir Cultural Trust has been safeguarding and promoting the rich cultural tapestry of Kashmir — from its ancient traditions to its vibrant living heritage.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.subtitle: To preserve, document, and promote the cultural heritage of Kashmir for future generations.

preservation.title: Preservation
preservation.description: Safeguarding Kashmir's literary, linguistic, and cultural treasures for future generations.

education.title: Education
education.description: Promoting Kashmiri language and culture through educational programs and publications.

community.title: Community
community.description: Building a global community of Kashmiri heritage enthusiasts and cultural advocates.

about.title: About Kashmir Cultural Trust
about.description: Kashmir Cultural Trust is a premier non-profit organization registered under the J&k Societies Registration Act, XII Svt. of 1941.

objectives.title: Our Objectives
items: To identify and preserve the cultural heritage of Kashmir
To publish books, journals, and periodicals on Kashmiri language and culture
To organize seminars, workshops, and cultural programs
To establish libraries and cultural centers
To document oral traditions and folklore
To promote Kashmiri language and literature
To collaborate with other cultural organizations
To conduct research on Kashmiri heritage
To create awareness about Kashmir's cultural legacy

heritage.title: Heritage of Kashmir
heritage.subtitle: A journey through the rich cultural tapestry of Kashmir Valley — from ancient civilizations to the modern era.

language.title: Language Academy
language.subtitle: Master the Kashmiri language through our comprehensive audio lessons and publications.

events.title: Events & Programs
events.subtitle: Explore our heritage festivals, workshops, lectures, and cultural celebrations.

publications.title: Publications
publications.subtitle: Explore our library of books, journals, and research publications on Kashmir's rich heritage.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Visual journey through Kashmir's cultural events, heritage sites, and community programs.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Reach out to us for inquiries, collaborations, or to get involved with our mission.

donate.title: Support Our Mission
donate.subtitle: Your generous contribution helps preserve Kashmir's cultural heritage for future generations.

newsletter.title: Stay Connected
newsletter.subtitle: Subscribe to our newsletter for the latest updates on events, publications, and cultural initiatives.

footer.about: Kashmir Cultural Trust is dedicated to preserving and promoting the rich cultural heritage of Kashmir.
